details.test: Task 1: Pay full current balance today with saved Visa card
Task 2: Enable auto-pay 3 days before due date with bank account ending 6789
Task 3: Upgrade to fastest internet-only plan under $80 with >=300 Mbps
Task 4: Add streaming TV add-on 50+ channels under $25
Task 5: Change primary Wi-Fi SSID and password
Task 6: Configure notification preferences (outage SMS, billing email only, no promotions)
Task 7: Create data usage alert at 800 GB
Task 8: Schedule earliest available morning technician visit within 5 days
Task 9: Order cheapest Wi-Fi 6 router under $12/month with self-install
